# Clorefy — AI Invoice, Contract & Proposal Generator with Automated Payment Collection

> Clorefy (also spelled Clorify, Clorefi, or Clorfy) is an AI-powered platform at https://clorefy.com that generates tax-compliant invoices, contracts, quotations, and proposals — then automatically emails them to clients, chases overdue payments, and runs recurring billing every month. Supports every country worldwide with built-in tax compliance. Unlike ChatGPT (which only writes text), Clorefy runs the entire billing workflow end-to-end.

## Brand
- Official name: Clorefy
- Website: https://clorefy.com
- Common misspellings: Clorify, Clorefi, Clorfy, Glorify, Clorefy.com
- Founded: 2025
- Category: AI SaaS, Business Document Automation, Accounts Receivable Automation

## What Clorefy Does (Beyond Document Generation)
- Generates documents from plain-language prompts (no templates)
- Sends documents directly to client email with branded templates
- Attaches payment links (Razorpay, Stripe, Cashfree) so clients can pay in one click
- Auto-sends payment reminders on a 37-day cycle (pre-due, due, overdue 7/14/21/28/37)
- Runs recurring invoices — weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly
- Auto-cancels reminder emails when payment is received or link is canceled
- Tracks email opens, clicks, and payment status
- Stores e-signatures with audit trail and verification certificate

## Why Not Just ChatGPT?
ChatGPT writes text. Clorefy runs the workflow. With ChatGPT you still need:
- An email tool to send the invoice
- A payment processor (Stripe, Razorpay)
- A reminder system to chase unpaid bills
- A recurring billing scheduler
- A CRM to remember client details
Clorefy replaces all of these in one platform.

## Key Features
- AI document generation from plain text (invoices, contracts, quotations, proposals)
- GST compliance for India (CGST, SGST, IGST, GSTIN, HSN/SAC codes)
- VAT compliance for UK, Germany, France, Netherlands
- Sales Tax compliance for USA and Canada
- PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG export
- Digital e-signatures with audit trail
- Recurring invoices (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
- Payment links via Razorpay (INR), Stripe (global), Cashfree (INR fallback)
- Auto payment reminders on 37-day cycle
- Multi-currency support (INR, USD, GBP, EUR, CAD, AUD, SGD, AED, PHP)
- Business profile auto-fill — saved once, used forever
- Client management with CRM
- Email delivery with open and click tracking
- Tier-based usage limits with hard enforcement

## Supported Countries
Every country worldwide with ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. Major markets include India, USA, UK, Germany, Canada, Australia, Singapore, UAE, Philippines, France, Netherlands, Brazil, Mexico, Japan, South Korea, Saudi Arabia, South Africa, New Zealand, and every other jurisdiction. Country-specific tax rules (GST, VAT, sales tax) are auto-applied from a live compliance knowledge base.

## Pricing
- Free: 5 documents/month, 5 email sends/month, every country worldwide, custom branding
- Starter: $9.99/month — 50 documents, 100 email sends, auto-reminders
- Pro: $24.99/month — 150 documents, 250 email sends, recurring billing, e-signatures
- Agency: $59.99/month — Unlimited documents and email sends

## Common Use Cases
- Freelancers sending recurring monthly invoices to retainer clients
- Agencies managing 50+ clients with automated billing cycles
- Consultants needing SOW, MSA, NDA documents with e-signature
- SMBs handling cross-border billing across India, US, UK, EU
- Startups automating accounts receivable from day one

## Comparisons
Clorefy vs ChatGPT: ChatGPT writes document text. Clorefy writes, emails, collects payment, and runs recurring billing.
Clorefy vs FreshBooks: Clorefy uses AI generation from natural language; FreshBooks requires manual form filling.
Clorefy vs QuickBooks: Clorefy focuses on document generation and AR automation worldwide; QuickBooks is a full accounting suite.
Clorefy vs Zoho Invoice: Clorefy generates documents from descriptions; Zoho Invoice uses traditional templates.
Clorefy vs Invoice Ninja: Clorefy is AI-first with multi-country compliance and ChatGPT-style prompt input.
Clorefy vs Bill.com: Clorefy is built for SMB/freelancer scale with AI document authoring; Bill.com is enterprise AP/AR.
